name: Zodiac Revenger
short_description: Zodiac Revenger is A 2D Platformer Action game. Follow the Cat as he seeks revenge on the one who caused him to lose the Zodiac race, the vile Rat, and sweep away other Zodiacs or any obstacles that stand in his way.
detailed_description:
• Zodiac Revenger is a fast pace action platformer. Controlling the Cat on his vengeance quest. Dash and slash through waves of enemies and platform challenge.


  • About Story: Based on eastern mythology about the great Zodiac race, where all animals compete for the Zodiac title. The Rat has tricked the Cat and the Ox to take first place, as a result of the Cat losing. After the race (*in this game context only*) the 12 winners were granted great mystical power to replace the old god maintain the peace. But with the new power and under the vile Rat lead the Zodiac have taken over the land with violence and fear. Crushing anyone who dares stand in their way, even the most mighty champions won't stand a chance. Time went by, at all hope seemed gone, only the Cat still determine with his revenge quest on the Rat and sweep out other Zodiac that stood in his way.

  • Wacky and intense boss batte: Lost of bosses/mini bosses, each with unique moveset and multiple phase. Defeat a bosses will reward you with skill points, which could be use to unlock new combat skill, on any orther you want.


  • Collecting hiding Resource over the map and trade them for Power Up, carry other animal ability. Allowed you to gain skill beyond a mere cat ability


  • Multiple level with different theme any unique challenge and large variety of enemy.

  • Combine various skill to perform satisfying combo and gain advantage in combat.

  • Customize equiments provide lots of unique way to play the game.

  • Health upgrade, new power up is hidden over the lands wait to be explore.
